usage_rules: Headings MUST be Uppercase for top-level titles (h1, h2).
Use 'tracking-tight' for all headings larger than 24px.
Use 'tracking-wide' for overlines and small labels.
Body text should have 'leading-relaxed' for readability.

layout.spacing_system: Generous. Use p-6, p-8, p-12. Avoid cramped p-2 or p-4 for main containers.

grid_system.dashboard: Bento Grid (Grid Mode A). Mix of col-span-1, col-span-2, row-span-2.
grid_system.lists: High Density Grid (Grid Mode B). Tight gaps (gap-px) with visible grid lines.

layout.container_style: Fluid but contained. Max-width 1920px for large screens.
layout.sidebar: Fixed width (280px), solid background #050505, border-r border-white/10.

cards.style: Flat, sharp or minimal rounded-md. 1px border (border-white/10).
cards.hover: Border color changes to white/30. Subtle scale (1.01). No shadow.

buttons.primary: bg-[#E60012] text-white hover:bg-[#FF1A2C] rounded-sm font-bold uppercase tracking-wider px-8 py-6
buttons.secondary: bg-white/5 text-white border border-white/10 hover:bg-white/10 rounded-sm font-medium px-6 py-6

inputs.style: bg-black border border-white/20 focus:border-[#E60012] focus:ring-1 focus:ring-[#E60012] rounded-sm h-12

tables.style: Tech/Data look. Header: uppercase, text-xs, text-white/50, tracking-wider. Rows: border-b border-white/5 hover:bg-white/5 transition-colors.

charts.style: Minimalist. Hide grid lines or make them very subtle (white/5). Tooltips must be dark glassmorphism.

visual_enhancers.texture: Add a fixed 'noise' overlay (opacity 0.02) to the entire app to kill digital flatness.
visual_enhancers.borders: Use 'Grid Borders' strategy for dashboard sections: visible 1px borders between sections.

hero_backgrounds.description: Concert crowd with red lighting - perfect for dashboard hero or login screen

instructions_to_main_agent: 1. INSTALL FONTS: Add the Google Fonts import to index.css immediately.
2. SETUP THEME: Update tailwind.config.js to use the specific colors defined in 'colors' section. Override the default shadcn colors.
3. LAYOUT: Create a 'DashboardLayout' component that includes the Sidebar and Topbar. Use the 'Bento Grid' for the main dashboard page.
4. COMPONENTS: Customize Shadcn components (Card, Button, Input) to match the 'Performance Pro' archetype (sharp edges, high contrast).
5. DATA: Use the provided image URLs for mock data. Do not use placeholders.
6. ANIMATION: Add 'framer-motion' for page transitions and hover effects. Use 'AnimatePresence' for smooth tab switching.
7. CHARTS: Style Recharts to match the dark theme (dark tooltips, thin lines, Sony Red for primary data).
universal_guidelines: DO NOT use gradients for backgrounds unless specified (use solid black/obsidian).
DO NOT use 'Inter' for headings. Use 'Barlow Condensed'.
Ensure all text has sufficient contrast (WCAG AA).
Avoid 'AI Slop' - make it look like a premium music app, not a generic admin panel.
